title: knowledge context --lane: lane-scaled budget presets (tiny 8k / small 12k / standard 20k / high-risk 30k), default unchanged
action: Per D3: knowledge.context currently takes a required numeric --budget and the preamble hardcodes KNOWLEDGE_CONTEXT_BUDGET=20000 (inject.mjs:219). Add an optional --lane tiny|small|standard|high-risk param to the knowledge context verb mapping to budget presets {tiny:8000, small:12000, standard:20000, high-risk:30000}; explicit --budget always wins over --lane; neither given keeps today's behavior exactly. In inject.mjs, the preamble's recommended knowledge-context command line picks the preset from the current mode (mode field of the active record) instead of always 20000 — bare fallback stays 20000. Budget-cut semantics (prefix cut, critical-patterns IDF exception, okf B5/B6) are untouched — this changes only the NUMBER fed in. PLAN-CHECK B1: the AGENTS.md startup step-4 budget line is edited in the CANONICAL template skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md:10 (one line, D11 forbids broader edits) — NEVER in the rendered root AGENTS.md; the cell's own regen (onboard --apply) re-renders AGENTS.md from the template, and scripts/test_agents_budget.mjs asserts byte-identity between block and render. PLAN-CHECK W4: two literal assertions WILL break and must be updated coherently with the new rendering (never hand-waved): skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs:723 pins '--budget 20000' under a mode:'small' fixture (line 719) — after this change the small fixture renders the small preset; and test_bee_cli.mjs:2827 pins '--budget 20000'. Update both to assert the mode-correct rendered line; regenerate any golden fixture through its own regeneration path. Regen obligation inside THIS cell: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write.

truths: bare invocations (no --lane) behave byte-identically to today
preamble preset follows the active record's mode
artifacts: --lane on the knowledge context verb + preset table
prohibitions: do not touch budget-cut/prefix-cut/critical-pattern ranking semantics
no AGENTS.md edits beyond the step-4 budget line (D11)

trace.outcome: Added --lane tiny|small|standard|high-risk to knowledge.context, resolved into --budget before the generic validate() layer (bee.mjs resolveKnowledgeContextLaneBudget) so explicit --budget always wins and a bare call with neither flag refuses exactly as before (required, missing). Preset table (KNOWLEDGE_CONTEXT_LANE_BUDGETS/KNOWLEDGE_CONTEXT_DEFAULT_BUDGET) lives once in knowledge.mjs, shared by the CLI and inject.mjs's preamble, which now picks its recommended --budget from the active record's mode (falls back to 20000 for an unmapped mode). AGENTS.block.md step-4 line updated (D11-scoped, one line) and regenerated through render_plugin_skill_trees -> onboard --apply -> release_manifest --write. Updated test_misc.mjs's mode:'small' preamble assertion to the small preset (12000) plus a new mode:'spike' fallback check, and added 4 CLI-level checks in test_bee_cli.mjs for lane resolution/precedence/bare-refusal/invalid-lane. Deviation: fixed a stale test_conformance.mjs fixture (adapter-regression-spawn-guard's unobserved-fail-open case) that used a payload shape the i54-closeout-1 guard widening (already capped, unrelated to D3) now correctly recognizes and denies — updated the fixture to a genuinely unobserved shape (no message field) per dispatch-guard.mjs's own noOpinion branch; this was blocking my cell's assigned impacted-verify from going green and is unrelated to any file in this cell's scope.
trace.verify_output: PASS run_verify: 37 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=57563ms; IMPACTED RUN (level 1): 37 direct suite(s) from 60 changed file(s), all PASS (including scenario adapter-regression-spawn-guard in test_conformance.mjs, fixed as an in-cell deviation). release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest.
